scripts.verify:full: npm run lint && npm run verify:cssd && npm run verify:engineering && npm run build
scripts.verify:cssd: npm run lint:cssd-architecture && npm run test:cssd -- src/modules/cssd-erp/shared/domain/cssd-qr-core.spec.ts src/modules/cssd-erp/helpers/assert-thiet-bi-cho-me-tiet-khuan.spec.ts src/modules/cssd-su-co/domain/cssd-incident-policy.spec.ts src/modules/cssd-erp/workflow/domain/cssd-state-engine.spec.ts
scripts.trial:prep: npm run env:bootstrap && npm run env:check
scripts.pilot:ship: npm run env:check && npm run verify:engineering && npm run build && npm run mdm:migrate && npm run trial:db:precheck
scripts.pilot:dashboard:explain:linked: npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/pilot-dashboard-rpc-explain-01-summary.sql && npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/pilot-dashboard-rpc-explain-02-compliance-multi.sql && npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/pilot-dashboard-rpc-explain-03-vst.sql
scripts.mdm:postcheck:sql: npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/master-data-cutover-postcheck.sql -o table
scripts.mdm:postcheck:sql:local: npx supabase db query --local --agent=no -f scripts/master-data-cutover-postcheck.sql -o table
scripts.verify:mdm: npm run mdm:coverage:gate && npm run mdm:postcheck:sql && npm run mdm:postcheck:fk
scripts.verify:mdm:local: npm run mdm:coverage:gate && npm run mdm:postcheck:sql:local && npm run mdm:postcheck:fk:local
scripts.skills:sync: node -e "console.warn('[BV103] Không đồng bộ full marketplace — thêm từng skill: npx skills add … rồi npm run skills:lock'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.skills:sync:softaworks-react-dev: npx skills add softaworks/agent-toolkit -s react-dev -a cursor -y --copy && npm run skills:lock
scripts.skills:sync:reviewing-code: npx skills add spencerpauly/awesome-cursor-skills -a cursor -s reviewing-code -y --copy && npm run skills:lock
scripts.verify:engineering: npm run engineering:baseline && npm run engineering:contract:gate
scripts.ops:dashboard-sql:linked: npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f supabase/migrations/20260511113_compliance_multi_always_return_checklist.sql -o table && npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f supabase/migrations/20260511112_rpc_get_vst_moment_table_hanh_dong_normalize.sql -o table
scripts.verify:admin: npm run admin:health:check && npm run verify:engineering
